name: eucomply
description: AI-powered EU compliance tool for Danish SMBs

scripts.dev: env -u __NEXT_PRIVATE_STANDALONE_CONFIG -u __NEXT_PRIVATE_ORIGIN -u __NEXT_PROCESSED_ENV -u TURBOPACK -u NEXT_DEPLOYMENT_ID -u NODE_ENV next dev --webpack
scripts.dev:turbo: env -u __NEXT_PRIVATE_STANDALONE_CONFIG -u __NEXT_PRIVATE_ORIGIN -u __NEXT_PROCESSED_ENV -u TURBOPACK -u NEXT_DEPLOYMENT_ID -u NODE_ENV next dev --turbopack
scripts.typegen: env -u __NEXT_PRIVATE_STANDALONE_CONFIG -u __NEXT_PRIVATE_ORIGIN -u __NEXT_PROCESSED_ENV -u TURBOPACK -u NEXT_DEPLOYMENT_ID -u NODE_ENV next typegen
